name: Dallas County, Texas (United States)

colors.symbolism: the hoist band and the star field
the star and the upper stripe

description: A flag in the style of the Texas Lone Star flag: a navy vertical band at the hoist bearing a centred white star, with two equal horizontal stripes in the fly — white over light-blue.
history: Flag of Dallas County, the second-most-populous county in Texas and a sub-state subdivision encompassing the city of Dallas and surrounding municipalities. Its design echoes the Texas state flag but substitutes light blue for red.
